Skip to main content Save the World Save the World

The world's biggest problems. What actually works.

 The Problems War & Conflict

Armed conflict kills hundreds of thousands annually and displaces millions more.
Poverty & Economic Inequality

700 million people live on under $2.15 a day. Inequality is rising within countries.
Climate Change

On track for 2.5–3°C+ warming. The window for 1.5°C is nearly closed.
Environment & Biodiversity

Earth's 6th mass extinction. 1 million species threatened.
Global Health & Disease

Preventable diseases kill millions annually. The treatment gap is enormous.
Inequality & Social Justice

Structural inequality perpetuates poverty and reduces societal wellbeing.
Education Access

244 million children out of school globally. Quality gaps are enormous.
Mental Health Crisis

1 in 8 people live with a mental health disorder. 700,000 die by suicide yearly.
Real problems. Real solutions. No guilt trips.

This isn't a comprehensive academic resource. It's a starting point. A way in.

Built with the Eddie Design System by Brad Frost.

© 2025 Save the World. This is a demo project.
